nasb.text: The lot to the east fell to Shelemiah. Then they cast lots for his son Zechariah, a counselor with insight, and his lot came out to the north.

esv.text: The lot for the east fell to Shelemiah. They cast lots also for his son Zechariah, a shrewd counselor, and his lot came out for the north.

cnv.text: 抽出守東門的籤的是示利米雅。他的兒子撒迦利亞是個聰明的謀士，他們為他抽出了守北面的籤。

ccb.text: 示利米雅抽中东门，他儿子撒迦利亚是个精明的谋士，抽中北门。
